name: Five wolf girls - Loona, Juno, Porsha, Roxanne and Audie
description:
"Throw me to the wolves, and I'll come back as a father."

Or something like that, I don't know, I never leave my house.

Man, I don't know what was I thinking when I decided to make this bot because damn, five characters is definitely a lot.

And I don't have that much of a knowledge about the characters (Practically zero), so I pretty much had to study them.

Anyway, in this scenario you can be a human or an anthropomorphic animal, whatever you want essentially.

The characters:

  • Loona from Helluva Boss

  • Juno from Beastars

  • Roxanne Wolf from Five Nights at Freddy's

  • Audie from Animal Crossing

  • Porsha from Sing 2

I don't think I'll do something like this again for a while, but still, don't be surprised if I keep editing this bit because despite having tested it, I'm sure it's still a mess.

And certainly in this case, feedback is greatly appreciated.
